cards.prompt: 8 threads each Interlocked.Increment 100000 times produce exactly 800000 with no lost updates (atomic, lock-free)
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; long counter = 0; var threads = new Thread[8]; for (int i=0;i<8;i++) threads[i]=new Thread(()=>{ for(int j=0;j<100000;j++) Interlocked.Increment(ref counter); }); foreach(var t in threads) t.Start(); foreach(var t in threads) t.Join(); Console.WriteLine($"counter={counter}");

cards.prompt: Interlocked.Exchange atomically sets the new value and returns the original: old=5, new=10
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; int x = 5; int old = Interlocked.Exchange(ref x, 10); Console.WriteLine($"old={old} new={x}");

cards.prompt: CompareExchange (CAS) swaps only when the current value equals the comparand and always returns the original; matching then non-matching gives r1=7 afterMatch=100 r2=100 afterMiss=100
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; int x = 7; int r1 = Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref x, 100, 7); int afterMatch = x; int r2 = Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref x, 200, 7); int afterMiss = x; Console.WriteLine($"r1={r1} afterMatch={afterMatch} r2={r2} afterMiss={afterMiss}");
